speakers.speaker: Tilly Zhang
speakers.speaker_context: China technology and industrial policy analyst at Gavekal Dragonomics
speakers.reason: Provides expert analysis on China's regulatory policy consistency, anti-monopoly campaign, and anti-involution measures, offering valuable insights for investors.
